lessons_learned: Approval-state handling is now consistent across correction, rerun, and branching requests.
Execution-intended iterative visualization prompts now route to executable paths instead of remaining planned-only.
Session-scoped run resolution prevents cross-session leakage while still enabling historical comparisons.
remediation_applied: Semantic approval overrides for high-impact scientific changes (metadata correction, subgroup focus, design changes).
Prompt-aware iterative routing for transcriptomics figure updates.
Approved-plan input autobinding plus session-safe rerun/diff reference resolution.
